items.title: Better Collective
items.summary: Leading end-to-end ML delivery across model families and thousands of cohort-level models tied to a large share of company revenue.
bullets: Business scope associated with roughly 85% of company revenue
Cross-functional work across product, marketing, and executive stakeholders

items.title: Amauta
items.summary: Built and ran a company across ML strategy, client delivery, operations, and business ownership, shaping how I think about execution under real constraints.
bullets: Led consulting work across ML strategy, data architecture, and analytics
Built playbooks, onboarding, and delivery rhythms
Owned operational realities beyond the technical layer

items.title: Teaching
items.summary: University teaching is a core part of how I work: making difficult ideas understandable, useful, and motivating for other people.
bullets: Professor of Statistics II and Introduction to Data Science
Assistant teaching across statistics, Python, and AI-related subjects
Strong emphasis on explanation, confidence-building, and rigor
